TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sadyr Japarov Sadyr Japarov (ryax sa 6 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1968 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Kurgyzstan ta' misuw hya' ga Sadyr Japarov, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Suga Yoshihide minkahul sa Keng-Suu na Kurgyzstan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: s~…ēa*jr *aparo* s~…ēa*jr *aparo* (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēu), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw kur…£jzs~…ētan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēa*jr *aparo*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral s~…ēu…£a jos~…ēńßińßi*e minkańßul s~…ēa keŇč-s~…ēuu na kur…£jzs~…ētan. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Sadyr Japarov Sadyr Japarov (ryax sa 6 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1968 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Kurgyzstan ta' misuw hya' ga Sadyr Japarov, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Suga Yoshihide minkahul sa Keng-Suu na Kurgyzstan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
